steps.t: The Orc camps of Uruk-gashan, Drû-garmadh, and Athmadhul can be found all along the road that runs through Nanduhirion, west and north of Echad Andest…
Dindirith is in Echad Andestel, the camp north of the road outside Lórien, and east of Nanduhirion. You have disposed of the Orc filth and should retu…
